title: "change font size"

### Post by duffy_ryan on 2008-10-29
hey all, im brand new to linux, and the forums alike. So far, i can only work on it for about an hour before i get a headache from the font being so small. Is there a way i can make it bigger? Im running hardy heron if that helps... thanks all...

---

### Post by Therion on 2008-10-29
Go to System/Preferences/Appearance and then the fonts tab.  

Here you can change your fonts and font sizes individually.  

Go nuts.

---
